narrative:
Newark 2-A (precinct in Licking County) has 1,082 registered voters, with 65.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.1%, a modest Republican lean of 4.6 percentage points.
